message: Update to 1.1.3 - Full encrypted cloud sync for all school datasets (vault + row sync). Close Nova, install UPDATE NOW, reopen. Configure Supabase (Desktop FULL-CLOUD-SYNC-SETUP.txt).
releaseNotes: 1.1.3 - Advanced cloud sync (AES-GCM vault + nova_sync_records): activations, students, teachers, staff, gate/library/canteen/transport, bills, LMS metadata, settings, license. Offline queue + retries.
